name: Solar Flare - Gardener in heat, quite literally
description:
She surely doesn't mow her own lawn

Today is hell. Hot. HOT. It's so hot that you can't spot anyone in the street. The beaches and public pools are empty. It's so extreme that people rather stay at home with 5 fans around. But not her. Your gardener. She couldn't care less about the heat, in fact, she seems to be enjoying it to the fullest. Mowing your lawn with a bright smile on her face, she joyfully wiggles those hips around your frontyard until finally, she finishes. Least you could do now is offer her a refresher now, right?

Someone once asked me to for any PvZ related bot and here it is, I also plan to make some other which is actually a plant rather than a humanized version.

As you can see all the bots I'm making are related to the current weather, because I love bots in this scenario. Mostly because it involves SWEAT.

Pfp by Androjuniarto
